hero.badge: AI Reading Partner · Coming Soon on iOS
hero.sub: Bookgolas sets your daily reading pace and lets AI recall every highlight you made. Not just finished — truly remembered.

features.label: 4 Pillars
features.title: Four pillars of true completion
features.sub: Break long books into daily pages. Let AI remember what you've read. Learn your reading patterns. And log every moment with near-zero friction.
features.f1Desc: Even a 500-page book finishes fast at 20 pages a day. Just set a target finish date — Bookgolas calculates your daily pace.
features.f2Desc: Highlight striking sentences or just photograph the page — OCR captures it all. AI searches by meaning, bringing it back exactly when you need it.
features.f3Desc: AI analyzes your patterns to reveal what kind of reader you are and which books you truly love. A richer reading life, powered by self-awareness.
features.f4Desc: Check progress from your iOS lock screen widget. Extract sentences from a single photo. Log, review, share — all in a second.

appDetail.label: App Details
appDetail.title: Here's what's under the hood
appDetail.sub: Bookgolas isn't just another reading tracker. It's an AI partner that reads, remembers, and analyzes with you.
appDetail.d1Desc: Set a target finish date and Bookgolas automatically calculates how many pages you should read today. Log your progress and watch your estimated finish date update in real time.
appDetail.d2Desc: "What was matrix multiplication again?" No exact keywords needed — RAG-powered semantic search finds it in the book or your own highlights. Everything you've read stays indexed in your mind, for life.
appDetail.d3Desc: After 3 finished books, AI analyzes your reading patterns. Discover the gap between the books you *think* you love and the ones you *actually* do. Plus a streak calendar showing your daily reading trail.
appDetail.d4Desc: Check progress from your iOS lock screen widget. Extract sentences from a single page photo (Google Vision OCR). Save and share your reading as an image. Friction, minimized at every step.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: This is how you use it
howItWorks.sub: No complicated setup. From install to your first highlight in under 2 minutes.
howItWorks.s1Desc: Sign up in 10 seconds with email or Apple ID
howItWorks.s2Desc: Search a book, set a target date. As you read, highlight or photograph the sentences that struck you.
howItWorks.s3Desc: AI searches by meaning and analyzes your patterns. You just focus on enjoying the book.

cta.title: Make every book truly yours
cta.sub: We'll email you the moment Bookgolas hits the App Store. Don't miss the feeling of *truly* finishing a book ✨
